pages.title: Royalty
pages.text: Defeat two bosses. (Bosses have a HP bar that appear at the top of the screen. Mowzie's Mobs and Botania add new bosses.)

pages.title: Reward
pages.text: Gain a mahogany sapling. It counts as a descendant of your heart log. Its vines count as part of your tree. You still cannot absorb other mahogany trees. (Craft it into planks to avoid accidental placement)
